tagline: Slow-motion confidence meets syrupy summer heat.
liner: Summer Drip is a chopped-and-screwed anthem celebrating slow-motion style and high-class detachment. The track opens in an anticipatory haze before the hard booming bass rattles through your speakers, setting a medium energy that lets every syllable breathe. Raspy melodic hooks with female lead energy float over pitched-down vocal chops, while southern twangs define the flirtatious flex vibe. This is not just music; it is a journey into glowing skin under streetlamp light and luxury fits on the dance floor. Feel the cool detachment from thirsty admirers as the tempo drags you deeper into the South's hottest summer atmosphere.
worldCaption: A syrupy visual of glowing skin, luxury streetwear, and slow-motion confidence against a Southern sunset backdrop with rattling hi-hats.

bios.lead: Delivers raspy melodic hooks with confident teasing charm.
bios.back: Adds depth to the cypher without stealing the spotlight.
bios.drums: Keeps the floor shaking with precise, chopped rhythms.
bios.perc: Rattles hi-hats that drive the slow-motion groove forward.
bios.bass: Delivers hard booming low-end drops for maximum impact.
bios.other: Layers textured sounds to enhance the syrupy sonic vibe.
bios.synth: Paints the sky behind the words.
